title: The Crafting Battle
levelGoal: Use creativity and crafted inventions to survive the escalating arena encounters, win the king's favor, and reach the transition to the next level.

startingInventory.name: Worn Sandals
startingInventory.descriptionMd: Basic **worn sandals** that protect your feet from splinters and sharp rock.

startingInventory.name: Linen Tunic
startingInventory.descriptionMd: A plain **linen tunic** with torn sleeves and plenty of dust.
